channel.title: GitHub Dart Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Dart in GitHub

item.title: flutter/packages
item.description: A collection of useful packages maintained by the Flutter team

item.title: leancodepl/patrol
item.description: Flutter-first UI testing framework. Ready for action!

item.title: shorebirdtech/shorebird
item.description: Code Push for Flutter and other tools for Flutter businesses.

item.title: flutter/flutter
item.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: Fully open source, End to End Encrypted alternative to Google Photos and Apple Photos

item.title: chen08209/FlClash
item.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

item.title: hiddify/hiddify-app
item.description: Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

item.title: isar/isar
item.description: Extremely fast, easy to use, and fully async NoSQL database for Flutter

item.title: flutter/samples
item.description: A collection of Flutter examples and demos

item.title: forus-labs/forui
item.description: Forus Lab's Flutter UI library

item.title: flutter/website
item.description: Flutter documentation web site

item.title: cfug/dio
item.description: A powerful HTTP client for Dart and Flutter, which supports global settings, Interceptors, FormData, aborting and canceling a request, files uploading and downloading, requests timeout, custom adapters, etc.

item.title: ReVanced/revanced-manager
item.description: 💊 Application to use ReVanced on Android

item.title: KaringX/karing
item.description: Simple & Powerful proxy utility, Support routing rules for clash/sing-box

item.title: fluttercommunity/flutter_workmanager
item.description: A Flutter plugin which allows you to execute code in the background on Android and iOS.

item.title: firebase/flutterfire
item.description: 🔥 A collection of Firebase plugins for Flutter apps.

item.title: aws-amplify/amplify-flutter
item.description: A declarative library with an easy-to-use interface for building Flutter applications on AWS.

item.title: dart-lang/sdk
item.description: The Dart SDK, including the VM, JS and Wasm compilers, analysis, core libraries, and more.

item.title: jiangtian616/JHenTai
item.description: A cross-platform manga app made for e-hentai & exhentai by Flutter

item.title: felangel/bloc
item.description: A predictable state management library that helps implement the BLoC design pattern

item.title: Predidit/Kazumi
item.description: 基于自定义规则的番剧采集APP，支持流媒体在线观看，支持弹幕。

item.title: Notsfsssf/pixez-flutter
item.description: 一个支持免代理直连及查看动图的第三方Pixiv flutter客户端

item.title: rrousselGit/riverpod
item.description: A reactive caching and data-binding framework. Riverpod makes working with asynchronous code a breeze.
